top_signals.title: Evergrande Liquidators Seek to Quash Regulator’s PwC HK Deal
top_signals.summary: China Evergrande’s liquidators have asked a court to void a HK$1 billion ($127.6 million) shareholder compensation deal a regulator struck with PricewaterhouseCoopers’ Hong Kong affiliate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jardine Matheson to buy back $500M in shares
top_signals.summary: Lincoln Pan, CEO at Jardine Matheson Holdings, announced a strategic blueprint that includes a share buyback, boosting returns and adding exposure to developed markets. He speaks exclusively on "Bloomberg: The China Show." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: A Record-Breaking Patch Tuesday for June 2026
top_signals.summary: Microsoft today released software updates to plug nearly 200 security holes across its Windows operating systems and supported software, a record number of fixes for the company's monthly Patch Tuesday cycle. Nearly three dozen of those bugs earned Microsoft's most dire "critical" rating, and exploit code for at least three of the weaknesses is now publicly available.

top_signals.title: Fuse boss attacks planning rules as a ‘self-imposed bottleneck for growth’
top_signals.summary: Alan Chang believes Britain’s energy crisis is largely self-inflicted. The founder of Fuse Energy, the $5bn (£3.72bn) energy supplier and infrastructure developer, argues that the UK already has the ingredients needed to drive investment in the sector. What it lacks, he says, is a planning system capable of turning that potential into projects. “There is [...]

alerts.title: Emperor Naruhito visits palace museum in Netherlands
alerts.summary: The emperor viewed exhibits such as paintings by court painters and toured rooms and a chapel while receiving briefings from the museum's head, the Imperial Household Agency said.

alerts.summary: Cisco has released security updates to address a vulnerability in the Catalyst SD-WAN Manager, tracked as CVE-2026-20262, that was exploited in attacks to escalate to root privileges. [...]
